title: More Nonsense Limerick 22
content:
There was an old man of Three Bridges,
    Whose mind was distracted by midges,
    He sate on a wheel, 
    Eating underdone veal,
    Which relieved that old man of Three Bridges.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 22"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
